a.title: Flag of the Torres Strait Islanders.svg

div.span: (SVG file, nominally 432 × 216 pixels, file size: 955 bytes)

p.span: The source code of this SVG is valid.

div.div:
Do not copy this file to Wikimedia Commons.
This is a representation of a government, military, regimental, family, or other symbol such as a flag, seal, emblem, coat of arms or crest. This symbol may be copyrighted by its holder. As well, it is known that the representation of this symbol is either copyrighted by the holder of the symbol or is not available under a free licence.
This file was uploaded to Wikimedia Commons as File:Flag of the Torres Strait Islanders.svg and deleted. Please check the reason for deletion on Commons before repeated transfer.

div.p: Flag of the Torres Strait Islanders
Vectorized by User:Andrwsc from http://www.itsanhonour.gov.au/symbols/otherflag.cfm. Also described at http://www.tsirc.qld.gov.au/our-work/torres-strait-islander-flag

td.p: The entire flag is used to avoid misrepresenting the image.

This is an SVG vector image of a registered trademark or a copyright-protected logo, seal or computer icon. This image should not be rendered any larger than is required for the purposes of identification and/or critical commentary. The default rendering of this image is of a size and resolution sufficient to maintain the quality intended by the company or organization, without being unnecessarily high resolution.

caption.div: Non-free media rationale for Torres Strait Islands

td.p: Illustrate the article on the Torres Strait Islanders people, as this is the symbol that represents them.

caption.div: Non-free media rationale for Torres Strait Islander Flag

td.p: Illustrate the article on this flag, as it is a unique piece of art and cultural symbol, and being able to view it would add significantly to the readers' understanding.

div.div:
This is a representation of a government, military, regimental, family, or other symbol such as a flag, seal, emblem, coat of arms or crest. This symbol may be copyrighted by its holder. As well, it is known that the representation of this symbol is either copyrighted by the holder of the symbol or is not available under a free licence. There may also be other restrictions on reproduction, including but not limited to article 6ter of the Paris Convention. It is believed that the use of low-resolution images of such symbols
to illustrate the symbol in question
on the English-language Wikipedia, hosted on servers in the United States by the non-profit Wikimedia Foundation,
qualifies as non-free use under the Copyright law of the United States. Any other uses of this image, on Wikipedia or elsewhere, may be copyright infringement. See Wikipedia:Non-free content.
Fair use //en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Flag_of_the_Torres_Strait_Islanders.svg
true

div.span:
This image shows a flag, a coat of arms, a seal or some other official insignia. The use of such symbols is restricted in many countries.
These restrictions are independent of the copyright status.
div.small: This tag does not indicate the copyright status or the source of the attached work. A normal copyright tag, a source (and a detailed non-free use rationale, if necessary) are still required. See Wikipedia:Copyrights and Wikipedia:Uploading images for more information.

1:2 ratio flag; same colors as the article source https://web.archive.org/web/20171201041858/https://www.pmc.gov.au/government/australian-national-symbols/australian-flags
Reduce nominal size to fit NFC guideline
Updated colours to official specifications (see Wikipedia article for source)
